Murder, robbery, and kidnapping—many incidents occur around them. And the three solve each of the many cases in a most surprising way—their appetite results in marvelous speculations! synopsis: Daiba Kakeru has always felt like he entered a new world whenever he ran. Tiring himself out by running would cause something like a runner’s high and his five senses would go into overload, causing them to be hyper sensitive. He would be able to notice tiny details, hear ridiculously faint or far sounds and his body’s reaction time would be incredibly quick. Kakeru has had a crush on his classmate Natsume for months now and he's finally able to ask her out, only to find out that she ran away from home that same night. But Kakeru picks up on the subtle clues left behind and realizes Natsume was kidnapped. With the help of his resourceful science teacher Nezu Michiko, Kakeru uses his love as a motivation and hyper senses to track down Natsume.

titleNative: 追放された聖女ですが、実は国中から愛されすぎてて怖いんですけど!?～聖女イヴリンと愉快な（？）仲間たち～
synopsis: For years, Saint Evelyn has protected her country with her powerful healing magic, earning her the love of the people. But then, the first prince breaks off their engagement and strips her of her title, only to name her incompetent half sister as the new saint. Cast out from the only life she's ever known, Evelyn is forced to find her place in a world that suddenly feels all too vast. Fate smiles upon her when she stumbles upon a young boy from the streets who shows her a new path: making a living with her healing magic. The next thing she knows, she's earned her first commission—and a handsome count is proposing to her?! With discontent growing in the royal family over the prince's folly and adoring fans flocking to her side, Evelyn must navigate political intrigue, newly realized fame, and unexpected romance in the air. Now if only she would realize just how much everyone adores her! (Source: J-Novel Club)

synopsis: To become a top-notch streamer, a reckless girl named Yoru Kihara, also known as "Angel Hell," earns money through extreme streaming. Thanks to the support of her fans, she managed to save up her target amount to move to the city. However, her abusive parents took everything: her savings and her streaming equipment. In utter despair, Yoru attempts her final act—streaming her own suicide from an abandoned building. But suddenly, she’s attacked by someone wearing a creepy rabbit mask. This marks her fateful encounter with "Streaming War," a grotesque streaming site where underground streamers go to satisfy their insatiable need for recognition!

titleRomaji: Atashi Merry-san. Ima Isekai ni Iruno…….

synonyms: It's Mary-san. I'm in another world now...
synopsis: Naibara Hirokazu left his parent's home in Miyagi to attend university in Tokyo and began living alone in an apartment in Saitama. Soon after moving, he answers a phone call from an unknown number that rings repeatedly, and hears a girl's voice saying "I'm Mary, I'm at the garbage dump right now... I'm the doll you threw away..." Thinking it's a prank call, he hangs up, but the call comes again and again... It seems like the girl is calling little by little, moving towards him!? The next day, he answers the phone, not knowing how many times it has already been called, and hears "I'm Mary, I'm in front of your room right now..." No sooner does he hear a strange voice praying from outside the apartment...? A phone call from Saitama to give advice to Mary, the urban legend who has been transported to another world!? A little girl connected by smartphone to a university student's story of defeating the demon king!! (Source: Gamma Plus, translated)

She became Iola, a girl who appeared halfway through the book. The world of the novel, centered around the saintly heroine and her romantic lead, was not meant for her. Still, she thought that becoming a character in a story might bring her happiness—just like the protagonist of a novel would. But everyone hurled hatred at her. They despised her. They called her Iola, the wicked woman who tormented the heroine—a false saint. But the truth was different. Iola herself was the true saint. Blessed by the divine, she returns to the very beginning. This time, she no longer needs her family, those who hate her, the title of Saint, or even the fiancé she once loved. She will walk a different path than before. "Even if this world tries to turn me into a villainess, I don’t care. I will survive and I will find happiness!" (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

But Ayame's life shatters after her parents' death, leaving her at the mercy of her cruel aunt and uncle, who tortured her until she lost her voice. As their daughter, Mari, rises to become the new priestess, Ayame is offered as a sacrifice to the Black Dragon. "Why do I have to die like this? Please help me!" In response to her desperate plea, the Black Dragon appears as a striking man and takes her hand, whisking her away to his realm. Chosen to be the bride of the Black Dragon Saku, Ayame finds herself in the enchanting Black Dragon Manor, suspended between the heavens and the human world. But jealousy ignites in Mari, who vows to reclaim Saku and make Ayame suffer once more. (Source: Pocket Comics)

One day, she had the same dream as usual, and then she was killed in a traffic accident. She found herself reincarnated as a young Letitia, before her execution. In order to avoid the terrible fate from her dreams, she tries to make a new life. First of all, she must find a way to avoid an engagement with the crown prince, who may be the one behind the plot....... (Source: Hifumishobo, translated)

synopsis: Three brothers—Yuito, Haruto, and Yuuma—lost their mother in a traffic accident and were taken in by their father (who lived apart from her), spending their days enduring unreasonable violence. Just when they were on the verge of despair, given no proper meals and having no relatives to rely on—they were caught in a landslide and all three were reincarnated together into an isekai. A passing adventurer, Thomas, protected the three who had collapsed by the roadside, and together with his wife Olivia, who runs the eatery "Olive Tree," they welcomed the three as a "new family"... A warm isekai slow life spun by the beloved three brothers begins! (Source: Earth Star Entertainment, translated)
